title: Add a dark-mode toggle to an existing site that persists in localStorage
user_message: Add a dark-mode toggle button in the top-right corner of every page. When clicked, it should toggle a `data-theme` attribute on the html element between 'light' and 'dark', and persist the choice in localStorage so it survives reload. Style both themes via CSS variables.

starting_files.content:

Welcome

This is a sample landing page.
